msgs: I made this special website for you because I wanted your birthday wish to feel special.
Not just a simple text message
Something you can open, smile at, and remember.
You mean a lot to me, and today deserves something a little extra.
So this is my small birthday surprise for you.
author: me

msgs: Before we continue, type yes when you are ready.

rejectHitTexts: Type yes when you are ready.
Okay, I am starting the surprise anyway.

msgs: First, I want you to know this.
You make ordinary moments feel warmer, softer, and happier.
Happy Birthday, Avani. You are truly special.
I hope you liked this special gift.
We all wished you with so much love, and this page is just a small way to keep those wishes close.
There is also a letter for you.
Can I tell you one more thing?

rejectHitTexts: I am saying it anyway because it is your birthday.

msgs: I hope this year gives you more smiles, more peace, and more reasons to feel loved.
You deserve happiness that feels easy, honest, and endless.
